name: fracture
description: Discrete Fracture Network (DFN) fractures — draw fracture polygons/shapes, colour by numeric/tensor/text/vector property via 'color-by', show 'intersections' and 'ghosts', and analyse orientation with 'stereonet' / 'rosette'. 'scale-by-magnitude' sizes fractures by a property.

basic_keywords.description: Colour fractures by a numeric/tensor/text/vector property or attribute. See sub-item 'color-by'.
Render orientations on a stereonet projection.
Render a strike/dip rosette of fracture orientations.
Scale fracture size by a magnitude property.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Colour DFN fractures by numeric/tensor/text/vector property or attribute.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create fracture orientation dip legend active on
plot item create fracture stereonet active on
plot item create fracture color-by numeric-property aperture legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour fractures by a numeric property (e.g. aperture).

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
